The concrete mixer pump is an innovative construction machine that combines concrete mixing and pumping functions in one machine, completing the work of two machines in the past.

Concrete mixer with pump saves manpower and is more economical, allowing builders to complete concrete pouring tasks more quickly, and is very suitable for small and medium-sized projects such as house construction, road paving and tunnel construction.

The Daswell concrete mixer pump has high pumping capacity, stable performance and flexible mobility, providing a reliable solution for modern construction sites and has won a lot of praise from users.
Theoretical pumping capacity:30-45m³/h
Power:Diesel engine / Electric motor

The concrete mixer pump is a machine that combines the functions of a concrete mixer and a concrete pump into one machine, allowing concrete to be mixed at the construction site and then pumped to the desired location. The innovation of combining mixing and pumping in one simplifies the concrete production process, especially in cases of inconvenient transportation or small projects. The loader can easily feed sand, stone, cement, and other raw materials into the hopper. Compared with traditional concrete mixers and concrete mixer pumps, it is easier and faster to complete the work, more economical, and more practical. It is a new and improved equipment.

The mixer pump machine can discharge the mixed concrete directly into the integrated pumping hopper. And our high-performance concrete mixer hydraulic pumping system can deliver it exactly where needed. With Daswell concrete mixer pump equipment, you can save time, labor, and costs on your job site.

Choosing a reputable concrete mixer pump manufacturer is critical for your investment. Our proven systems combine reliability with industry-leading performance to keep your projects running smoothly. If you want to know more about Daswell machinery, you can send messages to our team.

Dual Hydraulic Motors. Utilizing this motor, it has a faster driving speed and 30% higher mixing efficiency than standard models.

Choosing the Daswell company, you can get cleaner hydraulic systems for fewer failures, strict pre-testing for reliable performance, power stability for consistent operation, robust pipes, and quick clamps for faster workflow. Choosing the right concrete mixer pump is crucial for maximizing efficiency and productivity on your construction site. For ensuring that you can choose the most suitable pump machines, here are some factors you should consider for your reference.

These factors are important when you are selecting a pumping machine. The higher capacity means faster project completion. The proper aggregate size can reduce clogging risks. Correct power sources mean lower fuel costs and better mobility. And the adequate pumping distance can ensure no delays in concrete placement. The optimal slump means smoother operation and better-quality pours.

faq.q: What are the horizontal and vertical pumping distances of your concrete mixture pump?
faq.a: Horizontal pumping distance is 200 meters, vertical pumping distance is 50 meters.

faq.q: How many cubic meters of concrete can be pumped per hour?
faq.a: The mixer drum can produce about 20 cubic meters of concrete per hour. The pumping system can pump about 50 cubic meters of concrete per hour.

faq.q: Can the functions of pumping and mixing be used separately?
faq.a: Yes. If the mixer machine does not produce enough concrete, a concrete mixer truck can be used to transport the commercial concrete for pumping. Or add an additional mixer.

faq.q: How many workers are needed for the whole machine to work?
faq.a: The whole set of equipment needs only five people to operate. One person is responsible for loading by the forklift, one person is responsible for remote control of the equipment, one person is responsible for putting cement, and two people are responsible for taking over and removing the pipes on the floor. The mixer machine and transfer pump are directly controlled by one remote control, which is simple to operate. Compared with the traditional equipment, there are fewer construction people and the operation is more simple.

faq.q: How long is the delivery time?
faq.a: If the voltage is different, the delivery time of the electric concrete mixer pump is 20-25 days. The delivery time of diesel concrete mixer pump is usually 7-10 days.

paragraphs: Home » Concrete Pumps » Concrete Trailer Pump

Concrete trailer pump is a kind of concrete pumping equipment used to pump mixed liquid concrete to the construction site. Usually, the position of the drag pump needs to be fixed before construction, and the pipeline should be laid in advance.
Maximum theoretical concrete output:30-90m³/h
Output pressure:10-22MPa

Daswell concrete trailer pump for sale is a kind of S-tube valve drag pump, and the conveying aggregate size is 40mm. The equipment is mainly used for concrete construction of railways, highway tunnels, bridges and culverts, hydropower, mines, high-rise buildings and other projects.
It greatly improves the construction efficiency of engineering buildings, saves labor costs, shortens the construction period, and expands economic benefits.
In order to meet different engineering needs, Daswell has developed a variety of concrete pump trailers to provide customers with diversified choices.
Electric Type and Diesel Type: According to the power, it can be divided into electric drag pump and diesel drag pump.

Small and Large: According to the pumping capacity, it can be divided into 30 pumps, 40 pumps, 60 pumps, 80 pumps, 90 pumps, etc. As the name suggests, it pumps 30-90 cubic meters per hour. Among them, the small mini drag pumps 30 pumps and 40 pumps are more suitable for small and medium-sized projects such as rural housing construction.

Fine Stone Pumping Machine and Large Aggregate Pumps: According to the diameter of pumped aggregate, it can be divided into fine stone pump and large aggregate pump. The fine stone pump can pump the maximum particle size of aggregate ≤30mm. The large aggregate pump can pump the maximum aggregate particle size ≤ 40mm.
Special Used Trailer Concrete Pump: According to the usage scenarios, trailer mounted concrete pump can also be divided into special pumps for tunnels, special pumps for high-speed bridges, etc.
Therefore, it is recommended that you send your engineering pumping requirements to us before consulting the price, so that we can provide you with detailed technical services as soon as possible.

When it comes to reliability and efficiency, the Daswell trailer concrete pump stands out with its superior engineering and high-quality components. Every aspect of its pumping operation is optimized by seven major systems, ensuring smooth performance and durability. Daswell’s commitment to excellence is evident in every detail—only top-tier global brands are used in its construction.
Powerful and efficient power system
High-performance main pumping system
Precision distribution system
Reliable stirring system
Advanced cooling and filtration
Durable hydraulic system
Intelligent Electronic Control System

Daswell trailer concrete pump uses world-class components for unmatched reliability, optimized hydraulic and pumping systems for maximum efficiency, wear-resistant materials for extended lifespan, and intelligent electronic controls for precision operation.

The trailer type pumping machine features Kawasaki, Rexroth, Weichai, and Omron parts for reliability. For the contractors who has requirements on power, durability and precision. The Daswell concrete pumping machines are ultimate choices.
Want to buy high quality trailer pumping equipment with high efficiency? Get in touch with Daswell company.
Power Conversion
When generator or diesel engine starts, the power source will drive the main hydraulic pump. And the main hydraulic pump pressurizes hydraulic oil to create the energy needed for the pumping.
Concrete Delivery

The pressurized oil drives the hydraulic cylinder assembly. When the piston rod extends, it pushes the concrete cylinder piston forward. It forces concrete into the delivery pipeline. At the same time, the alternating action between the distribution valve and main cylinders creates a continuous flow: When one cylinder retracts, it draws fresh concrete from the hopper. While the other extends, pushing concrete into the pipeline. This synchronized cycle ensures non-stop material flow.
Precise material placement
Finally, it will pump the concrete to the pouring site through the conveying pipeline horizontally and vertically.

The Daswell trailer-mounted concrete pump has become popular across China and in over 30 countries worldwide. We deliver exceptional value and reliability to construction professionals. As demand grows, many clients ask: What is the price range for a concrete trailer pump?
Generally, the price of a concrete trailer pumper is about tens of thousands to hundreds of thousands of dollars per unit. It depends on the specifications.

At Daswell, you can get cost effective pricing. It is more affordable than many competitors. And our products are high quality components, ensuring long-term durability. Meanwhile, we can also customize for you. It can meet your specific project requirements.

You can get a precision configured pump machine for your own needs in Daswell. Due to the different requirements of the job site, our engineer will analyze your working conditions. According to the distance, height and output requirements of the job site, we will optimize configurations for maximum efficiency with competitive quote with no hidden costs.

Except for the pumping machine, Daswell also has concrete mixing facilities for you to choose from. You can get whole set of concrete making machine for your projects from Daswell company. And we can give you discount if you are interested in our other machines.

If you have interests on Daswell trailer concrete pump and price, you can contact us through Daswell official website. Our sales team will respond promptly with detailed technical guidance, customized pump recommendations, and transparent pricing.

When selecting a trailer-mounted concrete pump, how to choose between a diesel trailer pump and a electric model. Actually, it mainly depends on the job site conditions and environmental requirements. Here are some knowledge for you.

Electric Trailer Concrete Pumps: It is suitable for urban projects, where has strict regulation on noise and emissions. But it has requirements on stable grid power. If the electricity of job site is not stable, it will be not suitable.

Diesel Type Trailer Pumps: This pumps are ideal for remote site or areas with unstable or no power supply. While, it should be considered that there may be some exhaust emission, even though Daswell machinery meet emission standards.
In general, when you considering the power type of concrete trailer pumps, you should know these three factors for reference
If you do not know how to choose a suitable machine for your projects, we can suggest you according to your requirements. Please send messages to us.
